allow: PowerShell($exe = "c:\\Users\\KRSYPARK\\Desktop\\Sources\\GitUI\\GitUI\\bin\\Debug\\net8.0-windows\\GitUI.exe"; $p = Start-Process $exe -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; if \($p.HasExited\) { "EXITED with code $\($p.ExitCode\)" } else { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force; "ran 3s OK" })

PowerShell($exe = "c:\\Users\\KRSYPARK\\Desktop\\Sources\\GitUI\\GitUI\\bin\\Debug\\net8.0-windows\\GitUI.exe"; $stderr = "$env:TEMP\\gitui-err.txt"; $stdout = "$env:TEMP\\gitui-out.txt"; $p = Start-Process $exe -PassThru -RedirectStandardError $stderr -RedirectStandardOutput $stdout -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; if \(-not $p.HasExited\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force }; "STDERR:"; Get-Content $stderr -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "---STDOUT:"; Get-Content $stdout -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($exe = "c:\\Users\\KRSYPARK\\Desktop\\Sources\\GitUI\\GitUI\\bin\\Debug\\net8.0-windows\\GitUI.exe"; $stderr = "$env:TEMP\\gitui-err.txt"; $p = Start-Process $exe -PassThru -RedirectStandardError $stderr -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\gitui-out.txt" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; if \($p.HasExited\) { "EXITED with code $\($p.ExitCode\)"; "STDERR:"; Get-Content $stderr -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force; "ran 3s OK - window stayed open" })
